jobPostingInfo.title: Intern - Graduate Software Application Development
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Job Details:

Job Description: 

The Role and Impact Join Intel as a Software Applications Engineering Graduate Intern and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of software solutions that interface with cutting-edge Intel products. This position offers a unique opportunity to contribute to the development, optimization, and integration of software applications that support Intel's internal operations or enhance customer experiences. As part of a collaborative team, your work will drive innovation and enable scalable solutions, making an impactful contribution to Intel's technology ecosystem. You will immerse yourself in agile methodologies, explore full-stack software frameworks, and refine your technical expertise in a hands-on environment that promotes continuous learning and improvement. Key Responsibilities - Contribute to the development and optimization of software applications that interface with Intel products or support internal operations. - Assist in performance tuning, debugging, and enabling new features across operating systems and user-level applications. - Collaborate with design and customer teams to deliver robust and scalable software solutions. - Apply full-stack software frameworks to build and enhance applications. - Participate in DevOps practices to streamline software delivery and integration processes. - Embrace continuous learning opportunities to explore future career paths and deepen your technical expertise.

Qualifications:

Minimum Qualifications - Enrollment in a Bachelor's, Master's, or PhD program in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. - Foundational knowledge of Agile Methodology and DevOps practices. - Proficiency in full-stack software frameworks and development tools. - Strong analytical and debugging skills with attention to detail. Preferred Qualifications - Demonstrated ability to collaborate in team settings and communicate technical ideas effectively. - A passion for continuous learning and improvement in software engineering practices. - Eagerness to contribute to innovative projects that align with Intel's mission of driving technological excellence. Explore your potential, contribute to impactful projects, and be part of a collaborative team that values innovation and growth. Apply today and take the first step toward a rewarding career at Intel.

Job Type:

Student / Intern

Shift:

Shift 1 (United States of America)

Primary Location: 

US, California, Folsom

Additional Locations:

US, Arizona, Phoenix, US, Oregon, Hillsboro

Business group:

IT is the trusted technology partner for Intel's business, relentlessly focused on the experience of our people, our end users, and our customers. We design and support Intel's IT infrastructure, driving e-Commerce and web services with a focus on robust security and identity protection.

Posting Statement:

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, military and veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, gender, gender expression, gender identity, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by local law, regulation, or ordinance.

Position of Trust

N/A

Benefits

We offer a total compensation package that ranks among the best in the industry. It consists of competitive pay, stock bonuses, and benefit programs which include health, retirement, and vacation. Find out more about the benefits of working at Intel.

Annual Salary Range for jobs which could be performed in the US: $82,000.00-110,900.00 USD

The range displayed on this job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target compensation for the position across all US locations. Our standard internship rates are based on your degree, location, and the job role. Your recruiter can share more about the specific compensation range for your preferred location and job role during the hiring process.

Work Model for this Role

This role will require an on-site presence. * Job posting details (such as work model, location or time type) are subject to change.

*

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: Intel is committed to Responsible Business Alliance (RBA) compliance and ethical hiring practices. We do not charge any fees during our hiring process. Candidates should never be required to pay recruitment fees, medical examination fees, or any other charges as a condition of employment. If you are asked to pay any fees during our hiring process, please report this immediately to your recruiter.
